angle_name: AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action) - Brand Story
layout_name: Swiss Grid (Asymmetric left-aligned text layout, minimal background)

displayText.headline: Redefining India's Healthcare Standards
displayText.subheading: From cutting-edge diagnostics to world-class recovery, Max Healthcare brings together leading specialists and advanced medicine under one trusted network.
displayText.footer: Max Healthcare Network - Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Punjab & Uttarakhand.

data.style: Asymmetric, clean Swiss typography, heavy grids, minimal off-white background.
data.description: Clean grid layout with a prominent left-aligned bold headline in Outfit font. The right panel features high-resolution clinical research labs. Modern minimal borders segmenting the emergency contacts and location details in GeistMono or WorkSans.

angle_name: PAS (Problem, Agitate, Solution) - Core Pain Point
layout_name: Marble Pedestal (Centered text, products balanced on a white marble platform)

displayText.headline: When Seconds Count, Uncertainty Is Not an Option
displayText.subheading: Critical moments demand instant, world-class intervention. Access India's top-tier emergency teams and advanced cardiac/stroke protocols immediately.
displayText.footer: Accredited Level-1 Trauma Centers across India.

data.style: Centered, monumental, marble platform, pure trust and prestige.
data.description: A central white marble pedestal holding a glowing crimson emergency beacon next to a medical stethoscope, symbolizing absolute stability and rapid response. Soft focus, premium studio lighting.

layout_name: Linear Gradient Float (Glow effects, products suspended mid-air with soft shadows)

displayText.headline: From Chronic Pain to Restored Mobility
displayText.subheading: Leave behind the limitations of joint pain. Our advanced orthopaedic robotics and top-tier surgeons bridge the gap to your active, pain-free lifestyle.

data.style: Dynamic depth, floating clinical precision elements, soft teal glow.
data.description: A high-tech titanium artificial joint component floating mid-air, casting a realistic soft shadow onto a gradient teal-to-navy background. Subtle glowing blue lines trace the range of motion.

layout_name: Diagonal Split-Screen (Two-tone background dividing text and product zones)

displayText.headline: Chosen by Over 34 Lakh Patients Annually
displayText.subheading: Consistently ranked among the best multispeciality hospitals, backed by 3,000+ world-class doctors and pioneering clinical research.

data.style: High contrast, sharp geometric split-screen, clinical authority.
data.description: A sharp diagonal division: the top-left in deep blue hosting the trust metrics and bold text; the bottom-right featuring a warm, authentic portrait of a senior physician smiling warmly at a recovering patient.

layout_name: Studio Reflective (Deep charcoal background, products placed on reflective black glass)

displayText.headline: Precision That Redefines Cancer Care
displayText.subheading: Harnessing Next-Generation surgical robotics and targeted radiation therapies to eliminate tumors with sub-millimeter accuracy.
displayText.footer: Leading-edge cancer care units at Saket, Vaishali & Patparganj.

data.style: Ultra-premium dark mode, obsidian glass reflection, high-tech spotlight.
data.description: Deep charcoal background. A sleek, metallic surgical robotic arm is positioned on a highly reflective black glass platform, caught in a dramatic pinpoint spotlight highlighting its precise carbon-fiber joints.

layout_name: Botanical Minimalist (Overcast natural daylight, soft leaf shadows on concrete walls)

displayText.headline: Healing Spaces Designed for Faster Recovery
displayText.subheading: Merging advanced therapeutic environments with top-tier medical tech. Every detail is optimized for natural light, reduced stress, and rapid healing.
displayText.footer: Redefining corporate and premium healthcare spaces.

data.style: Natural overcast daylight, soft shadows, concrete and organic accents.
data.description: Soft leaf shadows fall across a clean concrete wall. A minimalist mock-up of a premium, sunlit hospital private suite is visible, emphasizing healing through modern architecture and natural harmony.

layout_name: Monolith Frame (Large geometric backing blocks behind the main product)

displayText.headline: Global Standards of Clinical Distinction
displayText.subheading: Offering world-class healthcare with dedicated international lounges, personalized care coordinators, and unmatched clinical outcomes in India.
displayText.footer: Direct connectivity from Delhi International Airport.

data.style: Bold monolithic backdrops, premium golden accents, architectural weight.
data.description: A massive navy-blue concrete monolith stands centered. Resting in front is an elegant gold-trimmed medical crest, symbolizing global prestige. Background features soft golden backlighting.

layout_name: Warm Editorial (Beige paper textures, classic serif margins, clinical markers)

displayText.headline: The Art of Preventative Longevity
displayText.subheading: Comprehensive screening designed by clinical experts to detect health risks early. Because true luxury is peace of mind.
displayText.footer: Tailored health screenings available across all major Max centers.

data.style: Warm beige paper texture, elegant editorial serifs, generous white space.
data.description: A beige-textured workspace visual containing an elegant clinic brochure, a leather-bound notebook, and a gold-nibbed pen. Elegant clinical markers set inside fine black margins.

layout_name: High-Contrast Spotlight (Dramatic low-key spotlight beam highlighting the product)

displayText.headline: Embracing Your Family’s Health Journey
displayText.subheading: From the first ultrasound to the moment you bring your little one home, we surround you with warmth, expertise, and continuous safety.
displayText.footer: Where life begins with world-class protection.

data.style: Low-key lighting, soft golden focus, highly emotional atmosphere.
data.description: A high-contrast scene with a dramatic, warm golden spotlight beam focused on two cradled hands gently holding a newborn baby's tiny foot, showcasing tenderness amidst clinical excellence.

layout_name: Minimal Collage (Overlaying multiple product angles, staggered offsets)

displayText.headline: A Legacy of Trust, Generation After Generation
displayText.offer: THE ULTIMATE STANDARD IN MULTISPECIALITY CARE
displayText.subheading: For decades, Max Healthcare has evolved alongside families across India, constantly upgrading our infrastructure to protect your future.
displayText.footer: Serving millions of families with uncompromising commitment.

data.style: Staggered frame overlays, modern clinical editorial, clean grid intersections.
data.description: A clean collage of three overlapping images: a historic foundation shot of Max Saket, a high-tech modern MRI console screen, and a close-up of a doctor placing a reassuring hand on an elderly patient's shoulder.
